description: Overview of 14 WorkSource Centers providing free career counseling training and job placement services across Los Angeles. Verified at 14 centers via EWDD official site.

description: Streamlined approval process for 100% affordable housing. As of November 2025: 42300 units filed and 31700 approved per The Real Deal / Propmodo. Prior figure of 31000 in site content is slightly outdated.

title: Internal Revenue Service (IRS) EITC Information
description: Established federal EITC maximum of $8046 combined with California CalEITC maximum of $3756 totaling approximately $11000 in potential tax credits for qualifying families

description: Verified California CalEITC maximum benefit of $3756 as component of combined $11000 family tax credit claim

title: Community Investment for Families Department (CIFD)

title: Los Angeles Homeless Services Authority (LAHSA) 2025 Count
description: 2025 Greater LA Homeless Count confirmed second consecutive annual decline: down 3.4% in city of LA and 4% countywide. County total 72308. City total 43699.

title: RAND Corporation Research on Inside Safe
description: Documented 49% decline in street homelessness in Hollywood specifically linked to Inside Safe program outcomes. NOTE: RAND also released a 2025 report flagging potential undercounting in LAHSA methodology.

description: Documented Tenant Anti-Harassment Ordinance enforcement and renter protection resources preventing illegal displacement

description: Offers empirical neighborhood-level housing data and policy analysis on LA housing affordability patterns and interventions

title: The Real Deal - ED1 Pipeline Coverage (November 2025)
description: Most current ED1 data: 42300 units filed and 31700 approved as of November 2025. More than double affordable approvals in the three years before ED1.

description: Largest affordable housing funding solicitation in city history. $394M+ across seven programs. Round 1 closed October 2025; Round 2 Spring 2026.

description: Primary source confirming overwhelming ratification of LAUSD contract with 30% raise lifting average salary from $25000 to $33000

title: HACLA Project Labor Agreement
description: Mayor Bass secured PLA covering all HACLA construction projects. Guarantees union wages local hire and apprenticeship opportunities on affordable housing construction citywide.

title: Bisnow - ED1 Streamlining Process Now Permanent (December 2025)
description: City Council unanimously approved Affordable Housing Streamlining Ordinance in December 2025 making ED1 framework permanent law.

title: LAHSA 2025 Homeless Count - USC Takeaways
description: USC researchers confirmed second consecutive annual decline. Chronic homelessness down nearly 22% since 2023. 28000 people placed in permanent housing in 2024 — a record.

title: Mayor's Office - Mayfair Hotel Conversion
description: City-purchased former Mayfair Hotel on Skid Row converted to 294 units of permanent interim housing with on-site medical clinic. Flagship Inside Safe project.

title: ULA Income Support Program - LAHD
description: ULA ISP provides direct financial assistance to stabilize vulnerable renters. More than $57M committed. Designed to prevent displacement before it becomes eviction.

title: Free Tax Prep LA - CIFD
description: 2024 results: 17400+ returns filed and $21.4M returned to low-income Angelenos. 45 locations. Free for households earning under $70000.
